brien_01.speaker: Brien
brien_01.text: Brien: Yo Tom, haven't seen you come eat ramen for days, what's going on?

brien_02.speaker: Tom
brien_02.text: Tom: My best friend just... passed away.

brien_04.speaker: Tom
brien_04.text: Tom: He was like a brother to me Brien.

brien_05.speaker: Brien
brien_05.text: Brien: I am so sorry for you my friend.

brien_06.speaker: Tom
brien_06.text: Tom: Thanks. You've been running this ramen place for 10 years since I came here, must know a lot hidden things.

brien_09.speaker: Brien
brien_09.text: Brien: Our decent worker now are in gangster things?

brien_10.speaker: Tom
brien_10.text: Tom: Just tell me where is it.

brien_11.speaker: Brien
brien_11.text: Brien: It's not about where it is. They won't let everyone in and out like any shop you can find on the street, you need recommendation.

brien_13.speaker: Brien
brien_13.text: Brien: What, you think I am a secret boss behind the scene and controls drugs and guns? No I can't!

options.text: I know you got a way.

brien_bribe_fail_to_agree.speaker: Brien
brien_bribe_fail_to_agree.text: Brien: It's not even about the money. I just got some customers from inside the market and I deliver ramen to them. I can't do anything.

brien_guilt_trip.speaker: Tom
brien_guilt_trip.text: Tom: I never asked you anything when I lent you 3000 euros 3 years ago.

brien_guilt_trip3.speaker: Tom
brien_guilt_trip3.text: Tom: And you know that was all I had in my bank account. You would be lying in the drain still if I didn't give you that.

brien_persuade.speaker: Brien
brien_persuade.text: Brien: Promise me you are not gonna cause any problem inside.

brien_persuade2.speaker: Tom
brien_persuade2.text: Tom: Who you think I am? I will not and I can not.

brien_agree.speaker: Brien
brien_agree.text: Brien: You helped me 3 years ago, this pays that back.

brien_delivery.speaker: Brien
brien_delivery.text: Brien: Just got a message from them. Bring these ramen with you and go to "TBD". Tell the guards you got some ramen for Knife.

brien_curiosity.speaker: Tom
brien_curiosity.text: Tom: It's not just ramen right?

brien_tease.speaker: Brien
brien_tease.text: Brien: you've been too curious today.

brien_not_boss.speaker: Tom
brien_not_boss.text: Tom: So you are that secret boss.

brien_denial.speaker: Brien
brien_denial.text: Brien: No. Now hurry, they won't be happy if you are late.
